description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark-tiled roof and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The facade features a symmetrical arrangement of windows and doors, with a balcony running along the upper floor. The property includes a paved driveway with two parking spaces, landscaped with palm trees at the front. To the side, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an umbrella, as well as additional trees and a car parked nearby. The exterior is finished in a monochrome palette, primarily black and white, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, front porch, balcony, driveway, and a backyard pool area, finished in black and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, driveway, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool, sun loungers, umbrella, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Back corner view emphasizing the pool area, umbrella, and landscaping, with the bungalow's rear facade visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped balcony doors
